knimeNode.name: Container Input (Raw HTTP)
knimeNode.shortDescription: Reads the body, headers, and the query string from an HTTP request calling the workflow and outputs it in 3 different tables.

intro.p: When an external caller executes the workflow with this node via an HTTP call to the KNIME Server's REST API, the HTTP body, headers, and query parameters are captured and exposed as tables.
There can only be one Container Input node in a workflow containing this node, as it captures the raw request.

fullDescription.option: The body data to return while building the workflow, when no actual request is available. The default body you can specify here must be encoded in base64.
The default headers to return while building the workflow, when no actual request is available.
The default query parameters to return while building the workflow, when no actual request is available.

ports.outPort: Table containing a single binary value in the column body.
Table containing one column for each header.
Table containing one column for each query parameter.
